# Configuration reference

<!-- Code generated by chok docs gen; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Generated from each module's Options type. `reload: hot` fields
apply on SIGHUP / config-watch reload; everything else needs a
restart (the reload diff warns instead of dispatching). `enabled`
is always restart-only by framework rule. Sensitive values are
redacted in logs and should ride environment variables in
production (`<APP>_<SECTION>_<KEY>`).

Named instances: sections marked *multi-instance* accept an
`instances.<name>` subtree with the same fields (env:
`<APP>_DB_INSTANCES_<NAME>_...`).

## `log` — Root logger section (level/format/outputs); hot level reload.

| Key | Type | Default | Reload | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `level` | string | `info` | hot | one of: debug \| info \| warn \| error |
| `format` | string | `json` | restart | one of: json \| text |
| `output` | list(string) | `stdout` | restart | — |
| `files[]` | list(object) | — | restart | — |
| `files[].path` | string | — | restart | — |
| `files[].max_size_mb` | int | `100` | restart | — |
| `files[].max_backups` | int | `7` | restart | — |
| `files[].max_age_days` | int | `30` | restart | — |
| `files[].compress` | bool | `true` | restart | — |
| `access_files[]` | list(object) | — | restart | — |
| `access_files[].path` | string | — | restart | — |
| `access_files[].max_size_mb` | int | `100` | restart | — |
| `access_files[].max_backups` | int | `7` | restart | — |
| `access_files[].max_age_days` | int | `30` | restart | — |
| `access_files[].compress` | bool | `true` | restart | — |
| `access_enabled` | bool | `true` | restart | — |

| Key | Type | Default | Reload | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `enabled` | bool | `true` | restart | — |

| `shutdown_timeout` | duration | `10s` | restart | — |

| Key | Type | Default | Reload | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `enabled` | bool | `true` | restart | — |
| `driver` | string | — | restart | one of: sqlite \| mysql \| postgres |
| `migrate` | string | `auto` | restart | one of: auto \| versioned \| off |
| `sqlite.path` | string | `app.db` | restart | — |
| `sqlite.max_open_conns` | int | — | restart | — |
| `mysql.host` | string | `127.0.0.1` | restart | — |
| `mysql.port` | int | `3306` | restart | — |

| `mysql.tls` | string | — | restart | — |
| `mysql.ca_cert` | string | — | restart | — |
| `mysql.max_open_conns` | int | `100` | restart | — |
| `mysql.max_idle_conns` | int | `10` | restart | — |
| `mysql.conn_max_lifetime` | duration | `1h` | restart | — |
| `mysql.conn_max_idle_time` | duration | `10m` | restart | — |

| `postgres.host` | string | `127.0.0.1` | restart | — |
| `postgres.port` | int | `5432` | restart | — |

| `postgres.password` | string | — | restart | **sensitive** |

| `postgres.ssl_mode` | string | `disable` | restart | — |
